title: Daily deploy digest — web-app (last 24h)
body:
## Shipped
- **#142** Extracted a shared cache helper — one source of truth for the lookup path.
- **#138** Modeled the checkout result as a discriminated union — the error paths are now exhaustive and type-checked.
- **#131** Added a smoke test for the password-reset flow.

## Summary
Maintenance-focused 24h: dedupe + type-safety, no user-facing changes. No regressions in the nightly run.

## Numbers
- 6 PRs merged · 0 reverts
